meaning: n.愚蠢,荒唐事,轻松歌舞剧,讽刺剧,傻念头,傻话,耗费巨大而又无益的事,<古>放荡
examples: It would be folly to turn the offer down.
It seems like an act of monumental folly.
Poverty and human folly magnify natural disasters.
Taxes and regulations always have unintended consequences, but Europe's transaction tax is folly twice over.
Vox Populi will explore how such corporate folly plays out on Twitter, Facebook and the Internet.
